description: You are a biostatistician at a pharmaceutical company analyzing data from the Thall and Vail (1990) epilepsy clinical trial using the MASS::epil dataset in R. The dataset contains seizure counts for 59 patients randomized to progabide (treatment) or placebo over four two-week periods, with a baseline count recorded over eight weeks. Conduct a longitudinal analysis in /home/ga/RProjects/seizure_analysis.R comparing a Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE) model using the geepack package (exchangeable correlation, Poisson family, robust SE) and a Negative Binomial GLMM using MASS::glmmPQL or a negative binomial GEE. The analysis should include model results and AIC comparisons.

metadata.dataset_source: MASS::epil - Thall and Vail (1990) epilepsy randomized controlled trial
metadata.task_note: Uses MASS (base R recommended package) + geepack (CRAN) for GEE analysis of real epilepsy trial data
